name: com.autech.levelplay-mediation
description: Unity LevelPlay (Unity Ads) mediation wrapper with InMobi CMP (IAB TCF v2.2) GDPR consent, CCPA/COPPA flags, iOS ATT handling, and encrypted Remove-Ads persistence. Mirrors the Autech AdMob Mediation package API so game code migrates with namespace changes only.

samples.description: Complete example scene with AdsExampleUI and all ad-format demos, wired to the VerifyandInitializeLevelPlay prefab.
InMobi CMP (Choice) plugin v2.0.1 — the IAB TCF v2.2 GDPR consent dependency. The package detects it on load and offers to import it automatically; you can also import it here manually.
